payment-info.title: Payment Information
payment-info.payment-due-date-tooltip: Please pay the booking before the payment due date, otherwise the booking will be cancelled.

payment-methods.title: Select payment method
payment-methods.note: Please carefully review and confirm the provided information before proceeding with the ticket purchase transaction. After payment on the next page, you won't be able to change the provided information, and we won't be responsible for any mistakes.

qr-method.title: QR code
qr-method.noteContent: Transfer money to our bank account. Order will be confirmed 5 minutes after transfer.

direct-method.title: Direct payment
direct-method.message: Please come directly to Mekong Smile Office
direct-method.ncmkAdress: No. 5 Tran Van Hoai Street, Ninh Kieu Ward, Can Tho City

bank-transfer-method.title: Bank transfer
bank-transfer-method.noteContent: Please choose the 24/7 express transfer method and transfer to your account.

export-ticket-modal.pleaseConfirm: Please confirm before exporting the ticket
export-ticket-modal.noteConfirm: Upon selecting confirm, the system will export the ticket
export-ticket-modal.errorBookedSeatExport: One of the seats you selected has already been booked. Please go back to the seat selection step to choose another seat. Tip: You can export the passenger list to quickly re-enter the data after changing seats.
export-ticket-modal.errorDuplicateSocialId: One or more ID numbers have been used repeatedly. Please check passenger information again.
export-ticket-modal.returnBookingStep2: Return to the step of choosing a chair
export-ticket-modal.errorExport: An error occurred during ticket export
export-ticket-modal.errorProcessingIssueTicket: This booking is currently issuing a ticket, please wait.
export-ticket-modal.errorInvalidStatus: This booking cannot be re-ticketed because it has already been successfully ticketed or has been cancelled
export-ticket-modal.errorNoCustomerAttached: This booking have no customer attached
export-ticket-modal.errorOrganizationBalanceNotEnough: The balance of your organization or one of its higher-level organizations is not sufficient.
export-ticket-modal.ticket_export_error: An error occurred during ticket export. Please contact the hotline for support. Error code: {{errorCode}}
export-ticket-modal.errorUnavailableSeats: One of the seats you selected has already been booked.
export-ticket-modal.errorDuplicateSocialIdOperator: The ID number of passenger has already been used in the selected voyage:

e-invoice.label: E-Invoice
e-invoice.not-found: This order has not publish e-invoice
e-invoice.errors-label: Having an error when publishing invoice. Please contacts the hotline for more information.
